calc
      1 + t₁.size + t₂.size = t₁.size + (t₂.size + 1) := by simp [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
      _ < 2 ^ t₁.height + 2 ^ t₂.height := Nat.add_lt_add_of_lt_of_le ihl ihr
      _ ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by

      _ = 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by simp [Nat.pow_add, Nat.two_mul]
